description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a gently curved shape and a slightly tapered tip. The peel is predominantly yellow with numerous brown spots and minor blemishes scattered across its surface, indicating a mature stage. The stem is intact, darkened at the tip, and the blossom end is slightly shriveled. The banana's surface appears matte with a semi-soft texture, and there are no visible tears or splits in the peel. Both sides of the banana show similar spotting, with the curvature most pronounced when viewed from the side. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel.
description: A yellow, spotted banana with a gentle curve and intact stem, showing minor blemishes and a matte, semi-soft peel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with yellow peel and brown spots visible.
description_view_1: End-on view from the stem, displaying the narrow width and the darkened stem tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the banana's curve and surface spotting.
description_view_3: End-on view from the blossom end, showing the shriveled tip and the lengthwise brown streak.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is intact with no visible tears or splits, but it has numerous brown spots and minor blemishes. The surface appears slightly rough and matte, with some darkening at the stem and blossom ends.
